vocab.example: Teachers do not just deliver facts; they pass on invaluable life experiences to the next generation.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy, làm bộc lộ (tiềm năng, tài năng)
vocab.example: A great educator knows how to bring out the best in every student, even those who lack confidence.

vocab.meaning: khơi mào, kích thích (sự tò mò, hứng thú)
vocab.example: An engaging lecture can spark off a lifelong interest in a particular subject.

vocab.meaning: được hiểu thấu đáo, thấm nhuần (kiến thức)
vocab.example: Teachers use various analogies to ensure that complex theories truly sink in for their pupils.

vocab.meaning: chỉ ra (lỗi sai, vấn đề) để cải thiện
vocab.example: It is crucial for a mentor to point out mistakes constructively so students can learn from them.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp (tốc độ bài giảng, xu hướng mới)
vocab.example: Without a teacher's guidance, many students would struggle to keep up with the fast-paced curriculum.

vocab.meaning: chia nhỏ, phân tích (thông tin khó hiểu)
vocab.example: Expert teachers are able to break down abstract concepts into digestible pieces of information.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy, khích lệ ai đó tiến tới
vocab.example: The encouragement of a tutor can spur a student on to achieve academic excellence beyond their expectations.
Teachers serve as role models whom students look up to for moral and intellectual guidance.

vocab.meaning: phục vụ, đáp ứng (nhu cầu, phong cách học tập khác nhau)
vocab.example: Effective instructors cater to the diverse learning needs of their students by using various teaching methods.
